title: Grilled Tofu with Smoky Venzuelan Sauce
description: A delicious and spicy dish featuring grilled tofu smothered in a smoky Venezuelan sauce. Perfect for a summer evening.
instructions: 2. Cut the tofu into 1-inch cubes and brush with olive oil.
3. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
4. Grill the tofu for 3-4 minutes per side, or until golden brown.
5. While the tofu is grilling, heat the smoky Venezuelan sauce in a saucepan over medium heat.
6. Once the tofu is done, serve it with the smoky Venezuelan sauce spooned over the top.
7. Garnish with chopped fresh cilantro, if desired.
